title: Warp Speed for Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) Vaccines: Why Are Children Stuck in Neutral?
summary: A viewpoint article advocating for the immediate initiation of phase 2 clinical trials for COVID-19 vaccines in children to address health, economic, and equity impacts.
key_findings: Pediatric COVID-19 vaccine trials are lagging behind adult trials.
Children face significant hospitalization and mortality risks from SARS-CoV-2.
Racial disparities exist in COVID-19 severity among children.
